1: Thy holy temple have they defiled; They have laid Jerusalem on heaps.
2: The flesh of thy saints unto the beasts of the earth.
3: And there was there was none to bury them them .
4: A scorn and derision to them that are round about us.
5: Shall thy jealousy burn like fire?
6: And upon the kingdoms that have not called upon thy name.
7: And laid waste his dwelling place.
8: For we are brought very low.
9: And deliver us, and purge away our sins, for thy name's sake.
10: By By the revenging of the blood of thy servants which is which is shed.
11: According to the greatness of thy power preserve thou those that are appointed to die;
12: Their reproach, wherewith they have reproached thee, O Lord.
13: We will shew forth thy praise to all generations.
